# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: my-vpc-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      name: my-vpc-network
      description: VPC network for three-tier application

  - name: my-subnet-frontend
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true

  - name: my-subnet-backend
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true

  - name: my-subnet-database
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true

  - name: my-firewall-allow-internal
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-internal
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: [0-65535]
      sourceRanges: ["10.0.0.0/8"]
      direction: INGRESS

  - name: my-firewall-allow-ssh
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-ssh
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: [22]
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      direction: INGRESS

  - name: my-firewall-allow-https
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-https
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: [443]
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      direction: INGRESS

  - name: my-firewall-allow-http
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-http
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: [80]
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      direction: INGRESS
